name: The Comet
parkName: Six Flags Great Escape and Hurricane Harbor
description:
The Comet is a wooden roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Escape and Hurricane Harbor in Queensbury, New York, in the United States. 

Built from parts of the Crystal Beach Cyclone in 1948 at Crystal Beach, The Comet was resurrected and reopened by the Great Escape in 1994.  Often rated one of the top roller coasters in the world in the 1990s, The Comet features a 2-minute ride over several hills.
imageAttribution: Station and lift hill of The Comet.
searchTerms: six flags great escape and hurricane harbor
